ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "schedule_name" TEXT /* Name of the schedule */,
  "schedule_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of schedule */,
  "schedule_description" TEXT /* Description of the schedule */,
  "schedule_minimum" REAL /* Minimum value of the schedule */,
  "schedule_maximum" REAL /* Maximum value of the schedule */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the schedule */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value of the schedule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the schedule was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the schedule is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_schedule_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_type_id") REFERENCES schedule_types ("schedule_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedule_types" (
  "schedule_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule type */,
  "schedule_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the schedule type (e.g., TEMPERATURE, FRACTIONAL, ACTIVITY LEVEL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the schedule type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the schedule type */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the schedule type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the schedule type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the schedule type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building manager responsible for the building */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of the building (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "total_floors" INTEGER /* Total number of floors in the building */,
  "total_units" INTEGER /* Total number of units in the building */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the building record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the building record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_schedules" (
  "building_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building-schedule association */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule */,
  "active_from" TEXT /* Date when the schedule becomes active */,
  "active_to" TEXT /* Date when the schedule stops being active */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the schedule for the building (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the building-schedule association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the building-schedule association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_schedules_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_schedules_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the building manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the building manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the building manager */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the building manager (e.g., admin, standard) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the manager record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the manager record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule being accessed */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building manager accessing the schedule */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the schedule was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedule_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the schedule */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the schedule */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "previous_description" TEXT /* Previous description of the schedule */,
  "new_description" TEXT /* New description of the schedule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the history record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedule_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedule_history_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)
